text.content: MAXAM is heading back to the Bassmaster Classic 2026!

text.content: The most exciting event in bass fishing - known as the

text.content: is heading back to Tennessee! The Bassmaster Classic will be held in downtown Knoxville and on the University of Tennessee Campus. MAXAM will have a booth inside the Knoxville Convention Centerer at the Expo, which will feature fun games for people of all ages where you can take your chance at winning prizes. We'll also have our products on display for you to experience up close. New this year, we'll have a space outdoors in the tailgate area. Be sure to visit our team for some fun giveaways and photo-ops.

text.content: Find MAXAM inside the Knoxville Convention Center at Booth #523 and at the tailgate near the main stage!
